title: Aurobindo Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Aurobindo Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Aurobindo Pharma has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aurobindo Pharma:
Aurobindo Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
